commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: And he is beginning to think of that same Heavenly felicity, and to reprove himself, because he hath been a beast, and hath longed for things earthly. "For what have I in Heaven, and from Thee what have I willed upon earth. By your voice I see that ye have understood. He compared with his earthly will the heavenly reward which he is to receive; he saw what was there being reserved for him; and while thinking and burning at the thought of some ineffable thing, which neither eye hath seen, nor ear heard, nor into the heart of man hath ascended he hath not said, this or that I have in Heaven, but, "what have I in Heaven. " What is that thing which I have in Heaven. How great is it. Of what sort is it. "And," since that which I have in heaven doth not pass away, "from Thee what have I willed upon earth. Thou reservest, he saith, for me in Heaven riches immortal, even Thyself, and I have willed from Thee on earth that which even ungodly men have, which even evil men have, which even abandoned men have, money, gold, silver, jewels, households, which even many. wicked men have: which even many profligate women have, many profligate men: these things as a great matter I have desired of my God upon earth: though my God reserveth Himself for me in Heaven.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Whom have I in heaven but you. and there is none upon earth that I desire besides you. I no longer envy the prosperity of the wicked, (Calmet) seeing that it is all a dream, and a snare, ver. (Haydock) Nothing can now give me content, but thyself. (Calmet) This is all we should desire, both for soul and body, as our true inheritance. The wicked, on the contrary, use their free-will to offend God, who destroys, or sentences them to eternal fire. (Worthington).

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links

advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
